channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: World-Open-Graph/br-acc
item.description: World Transparency Graph public codebase (🚧 website in progress)

item.title: builderz-labs/mission-control
item.description: The open-source dashboard for AI agent orchestration. Manage agent fleets, track tasks, monitor costs, and orchestrate workflows.

item.title: smartcmd/MinecraftConsoles
item.description: A certain block game

item.title: blader/theorist
item.description: A Codex/Claude skill that maintains per-repo operating theory documents.

item.title: eooce/python-ws
item.description: build vless / trojan /shadowsocks proxies on python server,no need core

item.title: mksglu/claude-context-mode
item.description: Stop losing context to large outputs.

item.title: ForLoopCodes/contextplus
item.description: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining Tree-sitter AST parsing, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph.

item.title: ylytdeng/wechat-decrypt
item.description: WeChat 4.0 database decryptor - extract keys from memory, decrypt SQLCipher 4 databases, real-time message monitor

item.title: Lakr233/vphone-cli
item.description: (no description)

item.title: jasnell/new-streams
item.description: A proposal for a new streams API

item.title: agentscope-ai/CoPaw
item.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

item.title: AlexsJones/llmfit
item.description: 497 models. 133 providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

item.title: ruvnet/ruflo
item.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

item.title: papercomputeco/stereOS
item.description: A Linux based operating system hardened and purpose built for AI agents

item.title: 6551Team/opennews-mcp
item.description: Crypto News Aggregation · AI Ratings · Trading Signals · Real-time Updates

item.title: zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
item.description: Create beautiful slides on the web using Claude's frontend skills

item.title: RightNow-AI/openfang
item.description: Open-source Agent Operating System

item.title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
item.description: (no description)

item.title: apple/python-apple-fm-sdk
item.description: Python bindings for access to the on-device model at the core of Apple Intelligence through the Foundation Models framework

item.title: thellimist/clihub
item.description: (no description)

item.title: odvcencio/gotreesitter
item.description: Pure Go tree-sitter runtime

item.title: mgechev/skills-best-practices
item.description: Write professional-grade skills for agents, validate them using LLMs, and maintain a lean context window.

item.title: better-auth/better-hub
item.description: Re-imagining code collaboration for humans and agents

item.title: fernandocruz/open-pix
item.description: (no description)

item.title: EvoMap/evolver
item.description: The Self-Evolving Agent Protocol (PCEC). It writes its own code. | evomap.ai

item.title: huggingface/skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: peteromallet/dataclaw
item.description: (no description)

item.title: vercel/chat
item.description: A unified TypeScript SDK for building chat bots across Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, Discord, and more.

item.title: cloudflare/vinext
item.description: Vite plugin that reimplements the Next.js API surface — deploy anywhere

item.title: anthropics/financial-services-plugins
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Polymarket/polymarket-cli
item.description: (no description)

item.title: GreatScott/enveil
item.description: ENVeil: Hide .env secrets from prAIng eyes: secrets live in local encrypted stores (per project) and are injected directly into apps at runtime, never touching disk as plaintext.

item.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
item.description: Agentic orchestrator for parallel coding agents — plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.

item.title: HKUDS/ClawWork
item.description: "ClawWork: OpenClaw as Your AI Coworker - 💰 $10K earned in 7 Hours"

item.title: vignesh07/babyshark
item.description: Flows-first PCAP TUI (case files, gorgeous UX). Do do do do.

item.title: Kirubel125/Kalshi-Claw
item.description: (no description)

item.title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
item.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

item.title: pablodelucca/pixel-agents
item.description: Pixel office.

item.title: Lakr233/AssppWeb
item.description: (no description)

item.title: kevinho/clawfeed
item.description: ClawFeed — AI-powered news digest with structured summaries from Twitter/RSS feeds and web dashboard

item.title: runesleo/x-reader
item.description: Universal content reader — fetch, normalize, and digest content from 7+ platforms (WeChat, Telegram, X, YouTube, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, RSS)

item.title: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
item.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

item.title: T3-Content/quipslop
item.description: (no description)

item.title: superhq-ai/shuru
item.description: A local-first microVM sandbox for running AI agents safely on macOS

item.title: vxcontrol/pentagi
item.description: ✨ Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
